failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id,
  p.description,
  p.published_at
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE
  p.published_at >= '2025-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND p.published_at < '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND (
    p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'daily & special')
    OR p.description ILIKE '%daily special%'
  )
ORDER BY p.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
connection failed: connection to server at "::1", port 5433 failed: Connection refused
